commands.review_summary:
The PR makes the Real behavior proof parser fence-aware for section discovery, field extraction, and missing-proof scanning, with a regression test for copied fenced terminal output.

PR surface: Tests +41, Other +57. Total +98 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not execute the parser locally in this read-only review. Current main's section, field, and missing-proof scans lack fence state, and the PR's regression test captures the fenced transcript shape that exposed the bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair job is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer CI and landing review for the PR.

target.title: fix(ci): ignore fenced headings in proof parser
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens the Real behavior proof parser so Markdown-looking headings and proof-like text copied inside fenced terminal output do not end, replace, or invalidate the proof section early.

This keeps the existing proof field requirements and mock-only checks intact. The parser now uses fence tracking for proof-section discovery, proof-section slicing, per-field value extraction, and the standalone missing-proof scan. Headings and copied phrases inside backtick or tilde fences stay transcript content; real PR-body headings and proof-field labels still delimit sections and fields outside fences.

## Context

PR #87341 exposed the original bug: its real behavior proof copied a generated prompt that contained `## TOOLS.md` inside a fenced output block. The parser treated that line as the next PR-body heading and could miss later proof fields.

Follow-up review found related edges in the same parser path: same-length info-string fences like ```` ```js ```` are content inside an outer transcript, copied headings such as `## Real behavior proof` must not become new proof sections, field-looking lines inside fenced output must not become field boundaries, and copied standalone phrases such as `not tested` inside fenced output must not trigger the missing-proof rejection.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Real behavior proof sections and fields keep parseable content after copied terminal output that contains Markdown headings, proof-field-looking lines, and standalone missing-proof phrases such as `not tested`, including when the transcript also contains a same-length info-string line like ```` ```js ````.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout worktree `.worktrees/87390-proof-parser-fence-aware-section` on macOS, branch `codex/proof-parser-fence-aware-section`, commit `783c7d99bd468122b6ad1e67b8159e2bb35684b2`, Node `v26.0.0`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a direct local node smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs` with a synthetic external PR body whose fenced terminal output contains `## Real behavior proof`, a field-looking `Behavior addressed:` line, `## TOOLS.md`, a standalone `not tested` line, and `openclaw gateway status` after the copied headings. Also ran the focused policy test file with the repo Vitest wrapper.

Evidence after fix: The direct node smoke returned `sections: 1`, `status: passed`, confirmed the evidence field still contains the copied `not tested` line, and confirmed the evidence field preserves the live command after it. Focused regression tests passed 1 file / 27 tests. Copied smoke output is included below.

Observed result after fix: `extractRealBehaviorProofSections` ignores copied proof headings inside fenced output, `evaluateRealBehaviorProof` preserves live evidence after fenced headings and copied `not tested` output, and the proof evaluator returns `passed` instead of `insufficient`.

What was not tested: Live GitHub Actions proof-gate rerun on commit `783c7d99bd468122b6ad1e67b8159e2bb35684b2`. External autoreview was not rerun because the escalation was rejected by policy for sending workspace diff data to an external review engine; this closeout used local source inspection plus focused local parser proof instead.

Direct parser smoke output:

```text
sections: 1
status: passed
reason: External PR includes after-fix real behavior proof.
evidence has copied not-tested line: true
evidence has live command: true
```

## Verification

- `node --input-type=module` direct parser smoke against `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-policy.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/real-behavior-proof-policy.test.ts` (1 file / 27 tests passed)
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

Refs #87341
target.author: monkeyleet
